name: Smoked Salmon, Peas and Bow Ties
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Low fat or skimmed milk
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the pasta according to the package directions, using water, milk, and butter or margarine.
2. Once the cooking time is complete, stir in the flaked smoked salmon and vegetables.
3. Serve with Parmesan cheese if desired. Makes 2 generous servings.
